form.formComment: Last start 4th (Fr4) over 1684m after showing early speed at Pinjarra beaten 50 m by From Tigerland (2:01.00) in MAIDEN on March 30 at $11. At her previous start was driven from back in the field when 7th (Fr5) over 2130m after being wide early at this track beaten 30 m by Dougs Legacy (2:41.10) in 4yo+ MAIDEN on March 24 at $23. Has the ability to measure up to this field.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (Fr2) over 1684m at Pinjarra beaten 55 m by From Tigerland (2:01.00) in MAIDEN on March 30 at $16. Before that, surrendered the lead and finished 4th (Fr2) over 2130m after showing early pace at this track beaten 25 m by Dougs Legacy (2:41.10) in 4yo+ MAIDEN on March 24 at $23. Can do much better.

form.formComment: Resuming after a layoff of five-and-a-half months. Well beaten at the end of her last preparation at this course when ninth at very long odds behind Major Typhoon. May need the outing and prefer others this time.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into second behind From Tigerland at Pinjarra over 1684m in a MAIDEN on March 30 at $6.50. Raced better the start before that with a good run when 3rd (Fr3) over 2130m after showing early pace at this track beaten 5.5 m by Dougs Legacy (2:41.10) in 4yo+ MAIDEN on March 24 at $3.10. Expected to go well again.

form.formComment: Resumes. Ran only once last preparation running when well beaten into eleventh after a quick start, behind Cara Diana at this track over 1730m in a 4yo+ 0-1 WIN on November 25 at $4.20. Big chance to return a winner.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Resumes. Ran only once last preparation running when well beaten into eleventh after a quick start, behind Cara Diana at this track over 1730m in a 4yo+ 0-1 WIN on November 25 at $4.20. Big chance to return a winner.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung outwards under pressure in the home straight.
Checked entering the front straight on the final occasion.
Broke gait in the score up causing a false start.

form.formComment: Fair performance when beaten by 5.5 m finishing fourth after showing early speed, behind Gelsomino Amal at Pinjarra over 1684m in a 4yo+ 1-3 WINs M on March 23 at $126. Then a handy effort when well beaten into third after showing early speed, behind From Tigerland at Pinjarra over 1684m in a MAIDEN on March 30 at $5.50. Can continue the good form and take this out.
